overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban pedestrian corridor in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring distinctive red elevated walkways, modern glass architecture, and transitioning from sunlit open areas to a shaded underpass beneath a highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian corridor with red elevated walkways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the pedestrian pathway beneath red elevated walkways toward a tall glass tower

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction
car driving on the adjacent road to the left

entered.detail: distinctive red metal elevated walkways spanning across the corridor overhead
modern skyscraper with glass facade visible in the distance
green metal railing separating the pedestrian path from the adjacent road
large rectangular concrete planter containing a mature tree

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic pedestrian corridor characterized by prominent red elevated walkways overhead. The path features green metal railings on the left and concrete planters with trees on the right, leading toward a distant glass skyscraper under clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian approach to intersection with benches and large planters

events.description: approaching the concrete highway overpass and intersection area ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past concrete benches and planters, approaching the street crossing under the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: white concrete bench integrated with the planter design
large concrete highway overpass creating a dark passage ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the corridor with increasingly prominent planters and benches on the right. The camera approaches a large concrete overpass structure while passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, with the glass tower drawing closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded pedestrian underpass beneath highway with graffiti walls

events.description: entering the deep shadow beneath the concrete overpass, dramatic reduction in ambient light
turning slightly right into the darker corridor with artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass with graffiti-covered walls and neon lights illuminating the right side

entered.detail: concrete retaining wall covered in purple and white graffiti tags
green fluorescent light strips mounted on the dark building facade

segments.scene_description: Entering a dramatically darker, enclosed space beneath the concrete overpass. The environment shifts from bright sunlight to shadow, revealing graffiti-covered walls on the left and neon lighting on the right, creating a stark contrast to the previous open corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a bright, futuristic pedestrian corridor that gradually descends into a shadowed urban underpass. It begins by walking along a path defined by prominent red elevated walkways and green metal railings, heading toward a distant glass skyscraper under clear skies. As the camera advances, the environment becomes more crowded with concrete planters and benches while passing pedestrians appear, drawing the viewer closer to a massive concrete overpass. The scene then shifts abruptly as the camera enters the enclosed space beneath the structure, where the bright sunlight vanishes into deep shadow. This transition reveals a stark contrast of graffiti-covered walls on the left and glowing neon lighting on the right.
